scripts.sync-templates: rm -rf templates/general templates/chat templates/agent && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' --exclude='build' --exclude='.server-port' --exclude='logs' --exclude='bun.lock' ../../templates/general/ templates/general/ && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' --exclude='build' --exclude='.server-port' --exclude='logs' --exclude='bun.lock' ../../templates/chat/ templates/chat/ && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' --exclude='build' --exclude='.server-port' --exclude='logs' --exclude='bun.lock' ../../templates/agent/ templates/agent/
